summary: Wing-back-driven 3-4-3 / 3-4-2-1 that crosses relentlessly (3rd highest in Europe) and is utterly lethal from set-plays.
style: 3-4-3 / 3-4-2-1 — wing-backs high & wide, wingers coming inside as '10s', huge crossing volume.

counterReliance.note: Crossing- and set-piece-led, not a transition side

strengths: Set-play kings — 48% of qualifying goals from corners/indirect FKs
3 of 4 vital play-off goals came from corners
Elite crossing volume (3rd highest in Europe)

keyPlayers.name: Pavel Šulc
keyPlayers.note: Pacey, direct dribbler with creativity & end product — 14 goal involvements this season

tactics: Wing-backs provide the width while wingers drift inside as second strikers; the crossing volume is enormous. Defend a set-piece against them at your peril.
sources: John Walker (@johnwalker_1986) — pre-tournament tactical scouting, May–Jun 2026
